'''Cala Worner''' was a female [[Human/Legends|Human]] recruiter for the Rebel Alliance during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Cala was a young covert operative for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], operating out of [[Aargonar 3]]. She was obstensibly a trade agent for the [[Outer Rim Trade Consortium]], and recruited a number of Rebels on [[Kwevron]] shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. On Kwevron, her most valuable contact was the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Idu Taanfaar]] until his death at the hands of [[Falto Dragen]]. She visited [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] shortly thereafter as the Alliance attempted to convince the [[Duro Shipwrights' Guild|Duro Shipwrights Guild]] and other corporations to increase their secret support for overthrowing the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During the climactic events at [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] which saw [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] flee that world, Cala was present. After eluding Imperial entanglements, she returned to the base at Aargonar. She was present when the Empire found and destroyed the base.

Her ship was the ''[[Midnight Star]]'', a modified [[YV-545 light freighter]].
